message:
feat(cli): print final index counts before "done." during --refresh

Follow-up to 80bd45ad. The polling loop polls every 500 ms, so the
final displayed count was often one sample behind the real end state
(e.g., 140/145 then jumping straight to `done.`). Add a one-shot
post-loop poll before the join arm so the last visible line always
reflects the indexer's terminal progress state.

Pure cosmetic; no behavioural change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
